title: Password Reset & Account Unlock
summary: Steps to securely reset user passwords and unlock locked accounts.
purpose: Provide a consistent, secure process for resetting passwords and unlocking accounts while verifying user identity.
scope: All Circle Gas employees and contractors with managed IT accounts.

roles.responsibility: Verifies identity and performs the reset or unlock.

steps.title: Receive and log the request
steps.description: Log the request in the helpdesk system. Record the requestor's name, email, department, and the nature of the issue (locked account or forgotten password).
steps.notes: Requests via WhatsApp or direct message are not acceptable — direct user to the helpdesk portal or email.

steps.title: Verify user identity
steps.description: Verify the user's identity before making any changes. For standard users: confirm full name, employee ID, and manager name. For privileged accounts: require IT Manager approval in addition.
steps.notes: Never reset a password based on an email request alone — always call the user or verify in person.
checklist: IT Manager approval obtained (privileged accounts only)

steps.title: Unlock account or reset password
steps.description: In Active Directory Users & Computers (or Azure AD), locate the account. For locked accounts: right-click → Unlock. For password resets: right-click → Reset Password, set a temporary password, and tick 'User must change password at next logon'.
steps.notes: Temporary passwords must meet complexity requirements: 12+ characters, upper/lower/number/symbol.
checklist: Account located in AD / Azure AD
Force change at next logon enabled

steps.title: Communicate new credentials securely
steps.description: Send the temporary password to the user via a secure method — use IT Glue's secure password sharing link. Never send passwords in plain text via email or chat.
steps.notes: The secure link expires after 1 view. Confirm with the user that they received and opened it.

steps.title: Confirm and close ticket
steps.description: Confirm with the user that they have successfully logged in with the new credentials. Close the helpdesk ticket and note the resolution.
steps.notes: If the user cannot log in after reset, escalate to check for AD replication issues or account policy conflicts.

references: IT Glue — Secure Password Sharing Guide

changeHistory.author: IT Helpdesk
changeHistory.notes: Added privileged account approval step. Mandated secure password sharing.
